title: stylisma rotundifolia
intro: Stylisma rotundifolia, also known as Roundleaf Stylisma, is a perennial plant native to the southeastern United States. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help soothe wounds, reduce pain, and prevent infection. The health benefits of Stylisma rotundifolia include its ability to aid in the healing of skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce swelling and promote tissue repair. Herbal preparations of Stylisma rotundifolia can be made into teas, infusions, or topical salves, and are typically used in traditional folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
